title: Retro Minecraft Visuals
description: A simple visual mod that contains various features to make your game look more like Old Minecraft! Renders fluids as blocky, as they were in Infdev. Aims to bring some nostalgic features to modern Minecraft!
body:
A simple visual mod that reverts various visual features to older versions!
## Note: This mod currently does not work with Sodium! ~~Fix coming soon~~

# Features:  
- Remove the dynamic model of modern fluids and replace it with blocky rendering (Minecraft Infdev)
- Render fluids as full blocks (Minecraft Classic)
- Replace flowing textures with still water (coming soon) (Minecraft Indev)

  
 Join the [discord](https://discord.gg/7a5KPXHaY4) for updates and to report bugs!
